channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hong Kong links up with Shanghai trade authorities to put cargo data on blockchain
item.description: HKMA teams up with mainland regulators to develop a cross-border platform linking cargo data and electronic bills of lading, aiming to cut trade finance friction and plug Chinese supply chains into global markets

item.title: European banks line up exchange partners for 2026 stablecoin launch
item.description: Qivalis, a consortium of 12 European banks, is reportedly in talks with crypto exchanges ahead of its euro stablecoin launch in the second half of 2026.

item.title: Riot Platforms, Core Scientific earnings, U.S. jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 2.

item.title: Aave proposal clears first hurdle with 52.6% support amid governance split
item.description: The Snapshot Temp Check passed 52.6% to 42%, sending the DAO-funded revenue model to the ARFC stage for revisions.

item.title: South Korea orders cross-agency probe after repeated crypto custody failures
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister Koo Yun-cheol ordered an inter-agency review of seized crypto wallets after the National Tax Service exposed a seed phrase in a press release.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $66,000, U.S. stock futures bleed as Iran hits Saudi oil refinery
item.description: Iran has reportedly stepped up attacks against U.S. assets in the middle east.

item.title: Bitcoin to see tailwinds if AI prompts ‘easier monetary policy’: NYDIG
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says AI could be a “general-purpose technology,” and its effects on the economy could be a boon for Bitcoin.

item.title: Anthropic's AI Used in Iran Strikes After Trump Moved to Cut Ties: WSJ
item.description: Claude was reportedly embedded in U.S. Central Command even as the White House ordered federal agencies to cut all ties with the company.

item.title: Over $9 billion flees bitcoin and ether ETFs in four months
item.description: Record outflows indicate that institutional appetite for digital assets has collapsed.

item.title: Fed could print money to support US conflict with Iran, says Hayes
item.description: Arthur Hayes says the longer Donald Trump engages in expensive “Iranian nation-building,” the more likely it is that the Federal Reserve will boost money supply.

item.title: Finance Minister Pledges Reform After Crypto Handling Failure in Korea
item.description: The pledge follows examples of custody lapses that have exposed weaknesses in how South Korean authorities secure seized crypto.

item.title: Bitcoin, cryptos under pressure as oil spikes 6% and global markets price in U.S.-Iran conflict
item.description: Bitcoin fell back to $66,700 as traditional markets opened to their first chance to price the weekend's military escalation, with oil surging to $77 and Asian equities dropping 1.4%.

item.title: ALERT! Our system detected a suspicious transaction targeting @InverseFinance's contract on Ethereum a few hours ago, resulting in ~$240K in losses. The incident appears to involve a DOLA price manipulation that forced multiple users into liquidation. We - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5nRFk3YWFydXVmbF9aTTEwTEt6blQweFpfX05MQ0lqSWcxa3FHTzFmaWIzeFlrYmNSYzU2UnBBOXJHNFN3a1dDRE9weWtCeDUzTkxqMHlQazVCUVFwdzZUU0dB?oc=5" target="_blank">ALERT! Our system detected a suspi…

item.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE token jumps 5% as Iran war brings windfall revenue, JUP gains on supply freeze
item.description: Traders lean into supply compression stories in altcoins as Hyperliquid ramps up token burns and Jupiter freezes new emissions, even as bitcoin churns between $60,000 and $69,000 with muted flow.

item.title: February crypto losses hit lowest level since March 2025, says PeckShield
item.description: PeckShield said fewer mega-hacks, heightened volatility and tighter risk controls may have helped push crypto losses to their lowest level in 11 months.

item.title: Magic Eden winds down EVM, Bitcoin NFT markets to focus on gambling
item.description: Magic Eden is shifting resources from NFTs to its casino platform Dicey, after a closed beta saw $15 million wagered by around 200 users in two months.

item.title: AI ‘vibe coding’ could put Ethereum roadmap ahead of schedule: Vitalik Buterin
item.description: Vitalik Buterin says AI coding still has “massive caveats,” but people should expect Ethereum’s roadmap to be finished much faster than expected.

item.title: Starting March 1, ALL hourly employees earn a Bitcoin bonus of 21 cents per hour! 🧡 We also offer $1k contribution to Trump Accounts, supporting our employees ' children. 🇺🇸 We aim to be a Maximum-Wage Employer in our respective communities. We look - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE8yNWFnOTFpdkdsY0c4OWNpbjRGQ2phU1lHOFZVZ1FVanN3OXRpcnI3cGtnSDhWSzIxeUpQQ3dIZWF2MWh0NkQ3bW5QQkRCMTRvY2JNb3FSVmFheHJjZUJRZ2RR?oc=5" target="_blank">Starting March 1, ALL hourly emplo…

item.title: Hyperliquid's Token Rises as Weekend Iran Shock Finds Few Open Markets
item.description: Hyperliquid's token is trading higher on the day as traders use the always-on venue to speculate on ongoing tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Bitcoin is relatively undervalued compared to gold and the global money supply, which could signal a price reversal, according to Samson Mow, the CEO of Bitcoin technology company Jan3.“Bitcoin is about 24%-66% below its trend relative to gold's market c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB4em05YWNQeDlQVGFGbnZRcXBvQ2FJaUllbjNSTWRpWXdNUXU1Q2ZBUGp6WjRZTzBHa29UVERXTlIwMFo2azl1WldvZ2JnclUxTEIxYzE2ZENrWnJhZTFFdFV2WFc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is relatively undervalu…

item.title: 🇮🇷 Newl interim Supreme Leader Ayatollah Arafi has reportedly been killed in an airstrike. He was appointed just today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5WWUNNRkNhTXY1cGQ1RnhsZEJyaDlzMy1hOTRESzE3QWU2QkVweXh4VkdBOUUxYl9Hck5yMkRwdDJRMFl0T1IzdHczWmZQdDMtVU5zNEFhZWJwUzN1RVNMMlBn?oc=5" target="_blank">🇮🇷 Newl interim Supreme Leader A…

item.title: Trump Media weighs Truth Social spinoff as crypto expansion accelerates
item.description: Trump Media expanded into crypto in 2025 with its fintech brand Truth.Fi, creating a Bitcoin treasury, filing multiple crypto ETFs, and forming a partnership with Crypto.com.

item.title: What the Iran Conflict Means for Bitcoin's Price
item.description: Attention has shifted to whether the Iran conflict remains contained, as Bitcoin traders weigh elevated oil prices and a rising gold price.

item.title: X allows paid crypto promotions but bans them in EU, UK
item.description: X’s head of product, Nikita Bier, said the new paid promotion label is designed to help users monetize content while remaining transparent with followers.

item.title: X removed “financial products” and “crypto” from the list of prohibited industries under its Paid Partnerships Policy. Nikita said the change was an error and has since been corrected, adding that he loves prediction markets. This means that cryptocurrency-relat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBkLXJKUlN4R0otc2FOdzRORUMyN25aWk4ySmxKSGV2Z3lFREE4dFk0QXRxWWNBYm9TY25YLUhGZHFiR3Nwc2d6TVIxR3BlLTNnVlZsU1V6MTZFbG9LNkF3R2huYw?oc=5" target="_blank">X removed “financial products” a…

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Oil prices surge by 13% - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE52cXp2cUNhaWl6RmRtOTRxTENPcnpadnhDZGpUU2dPckhYSE94Wng4RjNRVV8yWnUyYkY0LVlpTVFzZkNKMHFFSkl3a0VwYkNtQWJYRjZOa0N0UzJzY2djLTJn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Oil prices surge by 13…

item.title: Kalshi founder provides update on Iran's Khamenei market carveout
item.description: The prediction platform said it would reimburse users and resolve markets to the last-traded price before the death of the Iranian leader was confirmed.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 President Trump says conflict with Iran could last 4 weeks. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE14Y2pBMXg3NnE2ZDdfa3dzRDZnMlJZLS04dGhBYmlYc09ZejZZVW5ZeDk3WWpueW9oQWV3em1odDdmRVNTLXVfZ2pXVF9SQ0tNbDFMV29QTjNOSjE4cUgzZnhn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 President Trump s…

item.title: The Best AI Tools That Actually Respect Your Privacy
item.description: Big Tech AI tools treat your data like a buffet. Here are nine alternatives that don't—and which one wins for your specific threat model.

item.title: Bitcoin undervalued relative to gold signals potential rally: Analyst
item.description: Gold has become “overextended” after climbing to more than $5,247 per ounce, according to Jan3 CEO and Bitcoin advocate Samson Mow.

item.title: 90% of crypto influencers now need to now find a new business model that does not just involve them pretending to like a project that they were paid to promote allowing them to dump their "allocations" on the people that trusted them - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBVQ2VaOUx1cEJfWDNzbUhNd1luQ3h0b1p2cXg1UWJBMUV1VnFMMjlhTlVURllpQ0NFcXZ0LWZ3a0tKTEpUMHFiczZBeFRnd21xNWxURXU3YWo3dV90RF94SWlKaG1ab00?oc=5" target="_blank">90% of crypto influencers n…

item.title: Bitcoin losing trillions in value hasn't stopped traditional giants' interest in digital assets sector
item.description: At the iConnections conference in Miami this week, allocators signaled digital assets are now a core sleeve in alternatives.

item.title: Strategy boosts monthly STRC preferred dividend to 11.5% for March 2026
item.description: The 25-basis-point increase is the latest monthly adjustment of STRC’s dividend and comes amid a sharp downturn in crypto markets and broader macroeconomic uncertainty.

item.title: You Can Earn Real Bitcoin for Playing This Mining Empire Game—Should You Bother?
item.description: Bitcoin Empire on iOS and Android pays out real BTC to players, but is the digital mining grind worth the meager rewards?

item.title: Strategy lifts STRC dividend to 11.5% as MSTR extends monthly losing streak to 8
item.description: Led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, the company raised the annual dividend on its widely-followed preferred STRC ("Stretch") series by 25 basis points.

item.title: Bitcoin traders eye Iran reactions as oil spike raises US 5% inflation risk
item.description: Bitcoin avoided a fresh breakdown around major geopolitical events in the Middle East, with BTC price targets now including $74,000 next.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA1VkxyN2VyY1VPcG9ydVRGc3Q2TTlmMkhhNVlXa0VlU1Ztc2VHVk1GcW52a2p2V0ZwZFZGSVdZdGcwLTVJaFVXb3h0ZWR6SWVQYkpYeEhLcWdTMmYxQy1YUDdVWkM4UWM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: Stablecoin yield rewards (likely won't be) banned under OCC proposal: State of Crypto
item.description: The OCC's proposal's stablecoin yield procedures are the most ambiguous in that rulemaking plan.

item.title: Bitcoin market bottom may be nearing, at least if measured against gold, analyst says
item.description: Historically, bitcoin bear markets have lasted 12-13 months, suggesting a potential downturn until late 2026 if priced in USD.

item.title: The Legal Strategy Behind Crypto Exchange Backpack's Token-to-Equity Program
item.description: Backpack co-founder Can Sun said the exchange's upcoming token-to-equity conversion program threads the needle on securities laws.

item.title: CZ said, “Bitcoin reaching $200,000 is the most obvious thing in the world to me.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB4LURDNTNGTTdrU3hScERXbkRodWxKQzc3Sjd4VGt1bkZvWGxuc3BqM25od21fS3gtbnB4TDV3WnBXeG12Q0dGbDRuam9mZm9uT3llT29vVEh0VjFnUG1BNjFR?oc=5" target="_blank">CZ said, “Bitcoin reaching $200,00…

item.title: SpaceX’s $780 million bitcoin stack now down to about $545 million ahead of IPO filing
item.description: The company holds about 8,285 bitcoin in Coinbase Prime custody, a stake now worth roughly $545 million after a $235 million decline in value over the past three months.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Tokenized gold drives weekend price signals while CME futures are closed
item.description: Tokenized gold markets like PAXG and XAUt now handle nearly all gold price discovery when CME futures shut for the weekend.

item.title: US military used Anthropic in Iran strike despite ban order by Trump: WSJ
item.description: The US military reportedly relied on Anthropic’s Claude AI for intelligence analysis and targeting during an Iran strike hours after Trump ordered a ban on the company’s systems.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Iran launched two missiles towards the Island of Cyprus which house a large British airbase. Another escalation. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9sbnk5N25SOUpqbmxTUW1mTmt4MVVsZGx3V3lNWnZFMkszQWRiZGdNNXZ5dDY2ZU9sbHRlMVBkSzZFNFl1RlQ0bkZPSVZ0UU5sQ0ZyU1JiT3NYengyVEphekd3?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Iran launched two miss…

item.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge up to 10% as majors recover Saturday's war-driven losses
item.description: Solana led major tokens with a 10.8% bounce, while ether reclaimed $2,000 and bitcoin climbed back above $66,800 ahead of traditional futures opens on Sunday.

item.title: 6 Polymarket traders net $1M on US-Iran strike, spark insider fears: Report
item.description: The newly created Polymarket wallets placed bets on the timing of a US strike against Iran, buying shares hours before the first explosions were reported in Tehran.

item.title: Just how profitable is betting on #Bitcoin's price on #Polymarket? 3 linked wallets (likely owned by the same person) started trading on Feb 1. In just one month, they made $2.35M in profit. They only bet on whether $BTC goes up or down (sometimes also on $ - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin recovers to $68K following death of Iranian Supreme Leader
item.description: Crypto markets stabilized after geopolitical shockwaves from US-Israeli air strikes on Iran rattled risk assets.

item.title: Polymarket attracts record trading 'world' volumes as U.S.-Iran bets top $529 million
item.description: A prediction market about military strikes on a sovereign nation now sits alongside presidential election bets as one of the most-traded contracts the platform has ever hosted.

item.title: 🚨 INSIGHT: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum will launch native smart accounts within a year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9Oa01jcUZWWHF1UDBvaWh2a2xZSi1YN0xoM1NRSUxjVURTQUtNV1hOUFRDMDV4cUVqQ0tkR0hSV0pKUHZiNUw4aWJWem9EYzAtV0RKdWdvVjExT2JKRzhYV3JxTjM?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 INSIGHT: Vitalik Buterin say…

item.title: Bitcoin tops $68,000 after Iran confirms leader killed in U.S., Israel airstrikes
item.description: The death of Iran's supreme leader opens the door to regime change, and markets are pricing in a shorter period of tension.

item.title: Ethereum smart accounts are finally coming ‘within a year’ — Vitalik Buterin
item.description: Removing intermediaries with account abstraction is a “core principle of non-ugly cypherpunk Ethereum,” said Buterin.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin climbs back to $68,084 after crashing to $63,178 earlier today 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBObkNoS2NEb2tfT1pwaDFPV2U0cFNhZEQyZGdmelpZUUMtMk9tcUV6X2w0U2FMSjVpNzhxaDRPT1RoeU5adVltQTRJMF9keXZzUGVCbHgySkxfUUhEcFhPQWFzYk45RlE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin climbs bac…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇮🇷 Bitcoin reclaims $68,000 after Iran announces the death of Supreme Leader Khamenei. - x.com

item.title: Crazy moves on Bitcoin today. Bitcoin dumped $2,800 from its daily high after the US strike on Iran, wiping $58 billion from its market cap. Then BTC pumped $3,900 to $67k by day’s close, adding $78 billion back to its market cap. $570 million liquidated in the - x.com

item.title: Here's how bitcoin's price rise could be fueled by job-stealing AI software
item.description: Bitcoin's future hinges less on technological factors and more on how AI affects growth, employment, real interest rates, and central bank liquidity, NYDIG Research argues.

item.title: If you’d like to see less politics or crypto, just select all except those ones. This is an “early access” feature, so expect it to improve rapidly. - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin is stuck in a rut but JPMorgan says new legislation could be the ultimate spark
item.description: JPMorgan said the long-awaited Clarity Act would bring regulatory clarity, boost institutional participation and accelerate tokenization across U.S. crypto markets.
